items.title: Planet-moon ejections in close stellar encounters
items.summary: arXiv:2607.16402v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Free-floating planet-moon pairs (FFPMs) may form when planetary systems experience close stellar encounters. We quantify moon-retention probabilities and ejection cross sections for planets and planet-moon systems subject to close s…

items.summary: arXiv:2607.16404v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: JWST surveys reveal a greater space density of high-redshift UV-bright galaxies than predicted by conventional galaxy formation models. We present results from a $L=100$ cMpc cosmological simulation evolved to $z=5$ with a variation…
